hyperedges.label: Onboarding Slide Composition: StorySlide composes ProgressBar, StoryCard, OnboardingActions
Main App Route Group: MainLayout wraps all main pages via BottomNav
RTL Persian UI Pattern: Vazirmatn font + dir=rtl used across onboarding components
Domain Data Model: Types and Mock Data

nodes.label: Inline Design Tokens
nodes.rationale: No tokens.css — design values (colors, fonts, blur) are inlined. Primary blue #33A3FF, Vazirmatn font for Persian RTL text, glassmorphic card bg.

nodes.label: Next.js Version Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: This version of Next.js has breaking changes — APIs, conventions, and file structure may all differ from training data. Read the relevant guide in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing any code.

nodes.label: React Query staleTime Configuration
nodes.rationale: QueryClient configured with staleTime 60s (60*1000ms) to reduce unnecessary network fetches for queries.

links.description: Generic document icon: a 16×16 page with a folded top-right corner and three horizontal rule lines representing text content, rendered in grey (#666). Typical use: file-type indicators, upload areas, attachment icons.

links.rationale: SVG viewBox 0 0 16 16, fill #666, no stroke, clip-path applied — standard small UI icon dimensions.
A 16x16 SVG rendering a wireframe globe with latitude/longitude lines, filled in grey (#666), conventionally used to represent the internet, language selection, or internationalization.

The SVG file contains a 16x16 icon depicting a browser/application window with a title bar containing three circular dots (window control buttons), representing a generic window or browser window icon used in UI contexts.
